title: ProfileSelection
description: Runtime event indicating which profile is intended to be active

selectionId.description: Unique identifier for this selection event

selectedProfileId.description: ID of the ProfileDefinition being activated

selectedProfileHash.description: Content hash of the selected profile for verification

effectiveAt.description: When this profile selection takes effect

reason.description: Optional annotation explaining why this profile was selected

previousSelectionId.description: ID of the selection this replaces, for audit chain
